title: Find a way to tap into the 97%
html:
Title-only one-line market thesis from a 17-year-old Yahir in May 2020: find a way to tap into the 97% (the underserved majority outside whatever 3% niche is being chased). Sibling axiom to disruption and nonobvious in the same era.

yahir gonzalez · disruption · nonobvious

related.label: Find the hole, and fill the hole
